title: Install with Feedback Off
caseSnapshot:
Set OS culture to es-MX and try the following.

- in environment variables, try a new machine install with FEEDBACK set to FALSE. Refer to BL-8947.
VM notes
stepDescription: Set es-MX, disable feedback, test clean-machine install.
checklistSteps: Set the FEEDBACK environment variable to FALSE.
Run a new-machine install, ideally on a VM.
stepNotes: Refer to BL-8947.
bodyChecklistItems: Set OS culture to es-MX.
Set the FEEDBACK environment variable to FALSE.
Run a new-machine install, ideally on a VM.
Refer to BL-8947.
